videoCarouselCamera.subhead: Technique, transformations, and salon moments - open a film or let the reel drift.

hero.body: A sanctuary for the minimalist soul. We redefine hair artistry through high-end professional blonding and premium extension rituals in the heart of Berlin's creative district.

aboutArtist.tagline: Blonde is not a color. It's precision.
aboutArtist.bodyParagraph1: Hi, I'm Dennis – a self-employed master hairdresser and blonde specialist in Berlin Friedrichshain. For over 16 years, I've specialized in bleaching, balayage, lived-in looks, and natural, multidimensional hair color. If you're looking for a blonde expert in Berlin who combines high-quality results with healthy hair, you've come to the right place.
aboutArtist.bodyParagraph2: My focus is on modern techniques that allow for smooth transitions, clear blonde tones, and perfect nuances – all without compromising hair quality. Every color treatment is individually tailored to your hair type, your daily routine, and your long-term hair structure. I work with professional brands such as Olaplex, Evo Hair, Danger Jones and other high-performance products to guarantee you long-lasting, healthy and vibrant color results. Whether it's bleaching, balayage, root coloring, glossing or a complete color transformation: my goal is for you to leave my chair with a look that suits you – modern, individual and effortless.
aboutArtist.cardLead: Dennis Schneider is a Berlin-based master hairstylist and blonde specialist. From Friedrichshain, he builds natural, multi-dimensional blondes with a calm, considered approach.
cardBullets: 16+ years shaping blondes and lived-in color.
Every result is tailored to hair type, lifestyle, and health.
No one-size-fits-all coloring. Only subtle luxury.

portfolio.subhead: Visual representations of our commitment to light, form, and precision.

services.intro: Each ritual begins with a curated consultation to align your vision with our specialized blonding and extension expertise.
services.disclaimer: Prices may vary depending on hair density and length beyond standard packages.

artistsPage.intro: Discover the team behind the chair. Each profile includes specialties, contact links, and creative background.

recommendedProductsPage.title: Storefront
recommendedProductsPage.intro: Hi and welcome to my Storefront! You can find all my favorite products and tools I use behind the chair here.
recommendedProductsPage.expertPhilosophyP1: My focus is on modern techniques that allow for smooth transitions, clear blonde tones, and perfect nuances – all without compromising hair quality.

educationFaqPage.intro: Elevate your craft with in-depth resources, from comprehensive digital guides to hands-on masterclasses. Below you will find answers to the most common questions regarding my educational offerings.
educationFaqPage.ebookTagline: Stop fearing bleach. Start mastering it.
educationFaqPage.ebookBody: More than a color guide — it's your complete blonding blueprint. Created for hairstylists who want to take full control of their lifts, understand the why behind every formula, and work with bleach confidently — not cautiously.
ebookBullets: Understand the chemistry of lift and tone
Build a structured, predictable blonding process
Develop a stylist mindset that thrives under pressure
educationFaqPage.eventsTagline: Hands-on learning across Berlin & the EU.
educationFaqPage.eventsBody: Experience the master-blonde technique in person. My specialized sessions are traveling through Germany and Europe, offering an intimate environment to refine your technical skills and elevate your salon business.
educationFaqPage.contactSectionBody: If you need more details about private mentoring, booking me for a salon masterclass, or anything else, don't hesitate to reach out.

educationContactModal.title: Direct Inquiry
educationContactModal.intro: Inquire about 1-on-1 shadow sessions, upcoming masterclasses, or general educational support. I typically respond within 48 hours.
educationContactModal.successBody: Thank you for reaching out. I'll be in touch soon.
educationContactModal.errorAlert: Something went wrong. Please try again later or contact the artist via Instagram.
